steps.t: You should talk to Pippin and Merry in Bâr Thorenion to hear what, exactly, they are thinking about with regard to Mordor.
You should talk to Merry in Bâr Thorenion to hear his thoughts on where the two remaining half-orcs might be.
Pippin and Merry have asked you to go in search of the two half-orcs who fled the last encounter. Merry believes they will be found somewhere in Dor A…
Pippin and Merry have asked you to go in search of the two half-orcs who fled the last encounter. You have found one of them, come to a bitter end, on…
Pippin and Merry have asked you to go in search of the two half-orcs who fled the last encounter. You should follow the trail leading from the one hal…
Pippin and Merry have asked you to go in search of the two half-orcs who fled the last encounter. Tracks leading from the corpse of the first have led…
Return to Merry and Pippin in Bâr Thorenion with news of what you learned from the dying half-orc.
On returning to Bâr Thorenion, Gandalf has appeared and beckoned you over to speak with him.
You should talk to Pippin and Merry in Bâr Thorenion, telling them at least some of the whole truth, as Gandalf counselled you.
